name: Jira Sync
description: Create and link Jira issues from support tickets. Automatically sync status changes bi-directionally between CLIaaS and Jira.
author: CLIaaS

actions.name: Create Jira Issue
actions.description: Creates a new Jira issue linked to this ticket

actions.name: Link Existing Issue
actions.description: Link an existing Jira issue to this ticket

autoCreate.description: Automatically create Jira issues for new tickets
